name: uno-platform
description: Skills for Uno Platform cross-platform development including Fluent design, navigation, responsive layouts, and testing.

interface.shortDescription: Cross-platform Uno skills for design, navigation, layout, and testing
interface.longDescription: Use Uno Platform to access reusable cross-platform development skills for Fluent design, data-bound navigation, responsive layouts, theme-aware charting, and test workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use the Uno Platform plugin to help with layout, navigation, theming, or testing.
